title: Looker Studio Community Connector
description: Represents a Looker Studio community connector configuration, defining how the connector authenticates, presents configuration options, declares its data schema, and serves data to Looker Studio.

name.description: The display name of the connector.

logoUrl.description: URL to the connector's logo image.

company.description: The company or organization that developed the connector.

addonUrl.description: URL to the connector's Apps Script project.

supportUrl.description: URL to the connector's support page.

description.description: A text description of what the connector does.

authType.description: The authentication type required by the connector.

folderId.description: The Google Drive folder ID where the connector project is stored.

isAdminUser.description: Whether the current user is an admin of this connector.

configParams.description: The user-configurable parameters for the connector.

dateRangeRequired.description: Whether the connector requires a date range to be specified.

schema.description: The field definitions that make up the connector's data schema.

type.description: The type of UI element to render.

name.description: The unique identifier for this parameter.

displayName.description: The label displayed to the user.

helpText.description: Help text shown below the input element.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for text input elements.

isDynamic.description: Whether this parameter triggers a re-fetch of config when changed.

options.description: Available options for SELECT_SINGLE and SELECT_MULTIPLE types.

value.description: The value submitted when this option is selected.

Field.description: Defines a single field in the connector's data schema.

name.description: The unique identifier for the field.

label.description: The display name for the field.

description.description: A text description of the field's contents.

dataType.description: The data type of the field values.

conceptType.description: Whether the field is a dimension or metric.

semanticType.description: The semantic type describing the meaning of the field values.

defaultAggregationType.description: The default aggregation type for metric fields.

group.description: An optional group name for organizing related fields.

isHidden.description: Whether the field is hidden from the user interface.
